subcodes.first_line: God willing, may you ever dwell, joyous and at rest, beneath the shade of the Tree of Divine Grace of the Lord of all names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله همیشه ایام در ظل سدره عنایت مالک انام مسرور و مستریح باشید جناب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
